title: Characterization
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"e341m","text":"pH buffer preparing(in 15 ml centrifuge tubes):","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"da1gn","text":"pH2: 5 ml ddH2O, 8.8 ul 35% HCl, 37.5 mg KCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dg9eg","text":"pH5: 5 ml ddH2O, 20.8 ul 99.7% CH3COOH, 162 ul 3M CH3COOK, 31 ul 10N NaOH","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d8pim","text":"pH7: 5 ml RIPA buffer, 1.5 ul 35%HCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3ievi","text":"pH8: 5 ml RIPA buffer, 1 ul 10N NaOH","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"85dd5","text":"pH10: 5 ml ddH2O, 0.0147 g NaHCO3, 8.8 ul NaOH","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9c0nt","text":"pH12: 5 ml ddH2O, 32.4 ul 10N NaOH, 0.06 g KCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b4u7g","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add the reagents(on ice) for synthesis of mRFP into one well of the 384-well plate. Add the reagents from top to down. %s %s Do triple repeat Pipetting Solution A, Solution B, RNase inhibitor before adding. Pipetting the eppendorf contain RFP+terminator template to prevent precipitation.
Seal the plate with microseal (on ice).
Plate type: 384 well plate Select wells: At run time Description: 1.Temperature 37 °C
Put the plate into plate reader. Incubate the mixture and measure the fluorescence in plate reader follow Setup 1 for 02:00:00
Take the 384 well plate out of the plate reader.
Apportion 5 μL of mRFP reagent into 18 well. Pipetting before apportion. We actually add 4 μL into every well since we think it may evaporate.
Add pH2,5,7,8,10,12 Buffer solution respectively into different wells of mRFP till total volume of 100 μL. Do triple repeat. Pipetting after adding buffer solution
Excitation start: 550nm, Stop: 620 nm Fixed emission: 650 nm Step: by 1 nm Gain: Auto Gain (measured with selected wells)
Emission start: 550nm, Stop: 700 nm Fixed excitation: 540nm Step: by 1 nm Gain: Auto Gain (measured with selected wells)
Measure the fluorescence excitation and emission intensity of mRFP
creator: Cheng-Ruei Yang
